MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald E Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by David Moran.
Attorney Margaret Dematteo appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Brenda Clark is present.
Attorney Patrick Hill representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Aug 5, 2013 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
